proof: function[T0](x0: List[T0], x1: Nat) { list_subsets[T0](x0).filter(finite_set_cardinality_is_predicate[T0](x1)) = list_k_subsets[T0](x0, x1) }[A](items, k)
function[T0](x0: Nat, x1: FiniteSet[T0]) { finite_set_cardinality_is_predicate[T0](x0, x1) = x1.cardinality_is(x0) }[A](k, t)
function[T0](x0: Nat, x1: FiniteSet[T0]) { finite_set_cardinality_is_predicate[T0](x0, x1) = x1.cardinality_is(x0) }[A](k, t)
not t ∈ list_subsets[A](items) or not finite_set_cardinality_is_predicate[A](k, t)
function[T0](x0: List[T0], x1: Nat) { list_subsets[T0](x0).filter(finite_set_cardinality_is_predicate[T0](x1)) = list_k_subsets[T0](x0, x1) }[A](items, k)
t ⊆ FiniteSet.from_list[A](items) and t.cardinality_is(k) or t ∈ list_k_subsets[A](items, k)
not (t ⊆ FiniteSet.from_list[A](items) and t.cardinality_is(k)) or not t ∈ list_k_subsets[A](items, k)
function[T0](x0: List[T0], x1: Nat) { fs_from_list[FiniteSet[T0]](list_k_subsets[T0](x0, x1)) = finite_k_subsets_from_list[T0](x0, x1) }[A](items, k)

function[T0](x0: FiniteSet[T0], x1: lib(set).Set[T0]) { Option.some[FiniteSet[T0]](x0) != FiniteSet.new[T0](x1) or x0.underlying_set = x1 }[FiniteSet[A]](fs_from_list[FiniteSet[A]](list_k_subsets[A](items, k)), list_set[FiniteSet[A]](list_k_subsets[A](items, k)))
function[T0](x0: FiniteSet[T0], x1: T0) { x1 ∈ x0.underlying_set = x1 ∈ x0 }[FiniteSet[A]](fs_from_list[FiniteSet[A]](list_k_subsets[A](items, k)), t)
function[T0](x0: List[T0], x1: T0) { x1 ∈ list_set[T0](x0) = x1 ∈ x0 }[FiniteSet[A]](list_k_subsets[A](items, k), t)
(t ⊆ FiniteSet.from_list[A](items) and t.cardinality_is(k)) != t ∈ list_k_subsets[A](items, k)
function[T1](x0: Nat, x1: List[T1]) { Nat.zero != x0 or List.nil[T1] != x1 or List.singleton[FiniteSet[T1]](FiniteSet.empty[T1]) = generated_list_k_subsets[T1](x1, x0) }[A](0, List.nil[A])
function[T0](x0: List[T0]) { List.nil[T0] != x0 or 0 = x0.length }[FiniteSet[A]](List.nil[FiniteSet[A]])

function[T0](x0: T0, x1: List[T0], x2: List[T0]) { List.cons[T0](x0, x1) != x2 or x1.length.suc = x2.length }[FiniteSet[A]](FiniteSet.empty[A], List.nil[FiniteSet[A]], List.cons(FiniteSet.empty[A], List.nil[FiniteSet[A]]))
function[T0](x0: List[T0], x1: T0) { x0.length.suc = List.cons[T0](x1, x0).length }[FiniteSet[A]](List.nil[FiniteSet[A]], FiniteSet.empty[A])
function[T2](x0: Nat, x1: Nat, x2: List[T2]) { x0.suc != x1 or List.nil[T2] != x2 or List.nil[FiniteSet[T2]] = generated_list_k_subsets[T2](x2, x1) }[A](k, k.suc, List.nil[A])
function[T0](x0: List[T0], x1: Nat) { List.nil[T0] != x0 or generated_list_k_subsets[T0](x0, x1.suc) = List.nil[FiniteSet[T0]] }[A](List.nil[A], k)
function[T0](x0: List[T0]) { List.nil[T0] != x0 or 0 = x0.length }[FiniteSet[A]](generated_list_k_subsets[A](List.nil[A], k.suc))

function[T1](x0: Nat, x1: T1, x2: List[T1], x3: List[T1]) { Nat.zero != x0 or List.cons[T1](x1, x2) != x3 or generated_list_k_subsets[T1](x2, 0) = generated_list_k_subsets[T1](x3, x0) }[A](0, head, tail, List.cons(head, tail))
function[T1](x0: Nat, x1: List[T1], x2: T1) { Nat.zero != x0 or generated_list_k_subsets[T1](x1, 0) = generated_list_k_subsets[T1](List.cons[T1](x2, x1), x0) }[A](0, tail, head)

goal: generated_list_k_subsets[A](List.cons(head, tail), k.suc) = generated_list_k_subsets[A](tail, k.suc) + map[FiniteSet[A], FiniteSet[A]](generated_list_k_subsets[A](tail, k), insert_into_subset(head))
proof: function[T2](x0: Nat, x1: Nat, x2: T2, x3: List[T2], x4: List[T2]) { x0.suc != x1 or List.cons[T2](x2, x3) != x4 or generated_list_k_subsets[T2](x3, x1) + map[FiniteSet[T2], FiniteSet[T2]](generated_list_k_subsets[T2](x3, x0), insert_into_subset[T2](x2)) = generated_list_k_subsets[T2](x4, x1) }[A](k, k.suc, head, tail, List.cons(head, tail))
